zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Langford於1440年出生在英國維爾爾道千時，她的父親Edward de Langford24歲，母親Sancha le Blount25歲。她於大約1468年與Sir John Stradling在英國英格蘭維爾爾文特爾布恩 道千結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年在英國波克夏格亞特 雪福德享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Langford was born in 1440, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, her father, Edward de Langford, was 24 and her mother, Sancha le Blount, was 25. She married Sir John Stradling about 1468, in Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1519, in Great Shefford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Langford est née en 1440, à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward de Langford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sancha le Blount, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Stradling environ 1468, à Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1519, à Great Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Sie hat um 1468 in Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Stradling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Langfordが1440年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイで生まれた時，父Edward de Langfordは24歳，母Sancha le Blountは25歳であった。約1468年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィンテルボウルン ダウントセイでSir John Stradlingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年にイギリスバークシュアイアグレアト シェフォードで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Langford(이)가 1440년 영국 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward de Langford(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sancha le Blount(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윈터보우른 도츠이에서 Sir John Stradling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 버크실르 그리트 셰퍼드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Langford nasceu em 1440, em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward de Langford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sancha le Blount, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Stradling aproximadamente 1468, em Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1519, em Great Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ro.Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Englan: Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Langford родилась в 1440 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward de Langford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sancha le Blount, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Stradling около 1468 г. в местности винтирбурн даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1519 г. в местности грит шеффорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Sir John Stradling aproximadamente 1468, en Winterbourne Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
